title: LPGMC Modded
description: The modpack for the public Launchpad Games minecraft server
body:
This modpack is for playing on the **public** LPG Minecraft server, but you can use it on your own server if you want.

This modpack adds a lot of QoL and optimization mods, such as Sodium, Lithium, Krypton, Indium, Starlight, and LazyDFU, along with tweaks like having an elytra slot separate from your chestplate. It also includes Create, Simple Voice Chat, Oh The Biomes You'll Go, and some other fun stuff.

To summarize all of this, LPGMC Modded is meant to improve the vanilla experience and flesh out some simpler parts of unmodded Minecraft.

you can play on the server at `mc.launchpad-games.com` and join the discord [here](https://discord.launchpad-games.com)
